description: Play three.ws Coin Clash — read the faction battle board and leaderboard, enlist, and rally.
name: io.github.nirholas/clash-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves the Coin Clash endpoints. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for the live Coin Clash reads and writes.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Base58 Solana secret key for the enlisting wallet. Required only for the write tools (enlist_faction, rally_faction) — reads work without it. Per-call `secret` arguments override this. The wallet must hold the faction coin it enlists for. Treat like cash.
environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_SECRET_KEY

title: three.ws Coin Clash
